text: I stand slightly tilted in a bright, modern space defined by glass, graphics, and technology. The ambiance is one of curiosity and anticipation—the familiar silence of a museum or exhibition inviting contemplation. As I step closer to the vibrant R+D wall, I feel energized by the promise of progress, yet also small when facing the vast sweep of research and innovation. The seamless integration of design and information makes me aware of the endless interplay between humanity and technology. I feel both observer and participant, surrounded by the ongoing story of responsive evolution.
